stemHtml: An A320 has been de-iced and anti-iced and is ready for departure. However, the holdover time (HOT) has expired by five minutes while the aircraft is at the holding point in a queue for take-off. What is the correct action for the pilot in command?

options.a: Do an outside inspection of the wing and go back for De-Icing/Anti-Icing if deemed necessary.
options.b: Proceed with the take-off as the snowfall will not accumulate on the aircraft.
options.c: The crew must taxi back to be de-iced and anti-iced again, as the holdover time has expired and therefore takeoff cannot proceed under these conditions.
options.d: Proceed with the take-off, as the delay is minimal and the wing is likely still clear.
